title: Tormento
writer: Aldo De Benedetti, Libero Bovio, Gaspare Di Maio
actors: Amedeo Nazzari, Yvonne Sanson, Annibale Betrone
plot: Living with her father and stepmother in Naples, Anna is very unhappy as her stepmother hinders her attempts to live her own life. While her parents are away, she goes out with Carlo, but finds herself locked out when she comes ho...
